0018.name: DeskScout App 0.6.0 (Build 18) Alpha
0018.info: Bug fixes and changes to the update process

21.name: DeskScout App 0.7.0 (Build 21) Alpha
21.info:
Must be on build 20 or later to update
New Features:
Support for librelink and Dexcom accounts outside the US
Extensions! have a cgm thats not listed, you can now make your own glucose data providers
Included tools to make extensions
Extensions are available to install via command line only at the moment
If you updating, after the update completes you will need to Shutdown deskscout run upgradeSettings.py in the app folder and then reselect your CGM and sign in
